helper.description: base64 encoded Backup Helper Script body.

object_type.description: Type of object to fetch from the database

object_id.description: ID of the database object to fetch

name.description: One or more option names to include in the backup

carousel_display_exif.description: Show photo metadata (Exif) in carousel, when available.

jetpack_portfolio.description: Enable or disable Jetpack portfolio post type.

jetpack_portfolio_posts_per_page.description: Number of entries to show at most in Portfolio pages.

jetpack_testimonial.description: Enable or disable Jetpack testimonial post type.

jetpack_testimonial_posts_per_page.description: Number of entries to show at most in Testimonial pages.

jetpack_waf_automatic_rules.description: Enable automatic rules - Protect your site against untrusted traffic sources with automatic security rules.

jetpack_waf_ip_block_list_enabled.description: Block list - Block a specific request IP.

jetpack_waf_ip_allow_list_enabled.description: Allow list - Allow a specific request IP.

tiled_galleries.description: Display all your gallery pictures in a cool mosaic.

gravatar_disable_hovercards.description: View people's profiles when you mouse over their Gravatars

infinite_scroll_google_analytics.description: Use Google Analytics with Infinite Scroll

social_notifications_like.description: Send email notification when someone likes a post

sharing_services.description: Enabled Services and those hidden behind a button

jetpack-twitter-cards-site-tag.description: The Twitter username of the owner of this site's domain.

custom.description: Custom sharing services added by user.

stb_enabled.description: Show a <em>'follow blog'</em> option in the comment form

stc_enabled.description: Show a <em>'follow comments'</em> option in the comment form

wpcom_featured_image_in_email.description: Whether to include the featured image in the email or not

wpcom_subscription_emails_use_excerpt.description: Whether to use the excerpt in the email or not

jetpack_subscriptions_reply_to.description: Reply to email behaviour for newsletters emails

sm_enabled.description: Show popup Subscribe modal to readers.

prefix.description: Prefix to add before the stats identifiers.

modules.description: Data Modules that should be included in Full Sync

users.description: User IDs to include in Full Sync or "initial"

posts.description: Post IDs to include in Full Sync

comments.description: Comment IDs to include in Full Sync

fields.description: Comma-separated list of additional fields that should be included in status.

number_of_items.description: Number of items to checkout from the queue.

pop.description: Pop items from the queue instead of checking out.

force.description: Force unlock the queue before checkout.

use_memory_limit.description: Use memory-based checkout instead of fixed item count.

perform_text_conversion.description: If text fields should be converted to latin1 in checksum calculation.

shared_salt.description: Shared Salt to use when generating checksum

only_range_edges.description: Should only range edges be returned

detailed_drilldown.description: Do we want the checksum or object ids.

perform_text_conversion.description: If text fields should be converted to latin1 in checksum calculation.

redirect_uri.description: URI of the admin page where the user should be redirected after connection flow

secret.description: URL secret to compare to the ones stored in the database.

number.description: Number of items to return per page.

after.description: ISO 8601 lower bound on event timestamp.

before.description: ISO 8601 upper bound on event timestamp.

group.description: Only return events in these groups.

actor.description: Only return events performed by these actor IDs.

number.description: Cap on the number of events considered when counting groups.

before.description: ISO 8601 upper bound on event timestamp.
